Who We Are

Built for a
Circular Future

FixLoop is a purpose-driven platform connecting people, repair professionals, and responsible recyclers — closing the loop on appliance waste.

Our Mission

We exist to extend the life of every appliance, reduce e-waste, and make sustainable choices effortless for everyone.

Our Vision

A world where no working appliance ends up in a landfill — where every device gets a second life, every technician thrives, and the circular economy is the only economy.

Our Story

Founded in 2023 by a team of sustainability advocates and engineers frustrated by how hard it was to find reliable repair services.

Our Team

A diverse team of 40+ engineers, designers, and sustainability experts across 8 countries, united by a shared vision.

Our Values

Transparency, accountability, and impact drive everything we do — from how we build the product to how we measure success.

Our Impact

Since launch we have diverted 2.4M kg of e-waste, facilitated 50K+ repairs, and grown a community of 120K+ users.

Our Platform

Circular
Future

FixLoop connects every stakeholder in the appliance ecosystem — from first repair to final responsible disposal.

01
q

Repair Matching

Intelligent algorithms connect appliance issues with the right certified repair professionals in minutes.

02

Technician Discovery

Browse verified, rated technicians with transparent credentials, reviews, and specialization areas.

03

Circular Economy Integration

End-to-end platform orchestrating every phase of the appliance lifecycle within one unified ecosystem.

04

Reusable Parts Marketplace

A trusted marketplace to buy, sell, and exchange functional components, extending the life of every part.

05

Refurbishment Pipeline

Structured workflows for professional refurbishment, quality certification, and resale-readiness assessment.

06

Sustainable Disposal Guidance

Step-by-step guidance for responsible e-waste disposal with certified recyclers and drop-off locators.

The Process

Effortless From
Start to Loop

Four simple steps from broken appliance to circular resolution.

1

Report Issue ↓

Describe your appliance problem via our guided diagnostic form — takes under 2 minutes.

AI-Augmented Diagnostics

Our guided form is powered by AI that analyses your appliance model, symptoms, and usage patterns in real time — giving technicians a complete diagnostic brief before they arrive.

  • Smart fault detection from symptom descriptions
  • Parts & tools pre-identified for the job
  • Drives a higher first-visit repair success rate
First-Visit Repair Success

Because the AI prepares a full brief ahead of the visit, technicians arrive with the right parts and knowledge — reducing repeat visits, saving time, and cutting costs.

Close the Loop

After a successful repair, FixLoop automatically suggests the next circular step — whether that's refurbishment, responsible recycling, or putting the appliance back into use.

2

Match Technician ↓

Our platform surfaces verified technicians matched to your appliance type, location, and urgency.

5% Service Fee

FixLoop charges a 5% platform fee on successful repairs only — no upfront cost, no hidden charges. You pay only when your appliance is fixed.

  • Charged on successful repair completion
  • Covers matching, escrow & support
  • No fee if repair is unsuccessful
3

Repair or Refurbish ↓

Get your appliance repaired on-site, or enter the refurbishment pipeline for a full upgrade and certification.

10% Technician Commission

Technicians earn their service rate in full. FixLoop takes a 10% commission from the technician's side on every completed job — never from the customer.

  • Applied to technician payout only
  • Covers insurance, dispute & platform ops
  • Paid automatically after job confirmation
50% Avg. Appliance Fee

Recycling fees are calculated based on appliance weight and type.

CategoryFee Basis
Standard appliancesFixed 50% of average handling cost
Heavier appliancesVariable — based on weight (kg)
Bulk / commercialCustom quote via enterprise portal
4

Close the Loop ↓

Reuse, resell on the marketplace, or responsibly recycle. The loop continues — waste ends here.

Sell It As-Is — No Repair Needed

Not every appliance needs to be repaired first. You can list it directly on the FixLoop built-in marketplace in its current condition — buyers know exactly what they're getting thanks to your honest condition report.

  • List broken, faulty, or unused appliances instantly
  • Transparent condition grading visible to all buyers
  • Reach verified buyers actively looking for project appliances
  • Secure in-platform payment & handoff
Other Ways to Close the Loop
  • Refurbish & resell through the certified pipeline
  • Donate to a community repair hub
  • Responsibly recycle via certified e-waste partners
  • Strip for reusable parts on the Parts Marketplace
Platform Depth

Built for Every
Node in the Loop

Powerful features for homeowners, technicians, and sustainability teams.

Smart Repair Matching

ML-powered matching considers appliance brand, fault type, technician expertise, and location proximity for optimal pairing.

Technician Verification

Multi-layer verification including license checks, background screening, and continuous performance monitoring.

Appliance History Tracking

Full lifecycle records for every appliance — repairs, parts replaced, service history — accessible at any point.

Reusable Parts Marketplace

Peer-to-peer and B2B parts exchange with condition grading, authenticity verification, and secure payment.

Sustainability Insights Dashboard

Personal and organizational dashboards quantifying CO₂ saved, landfill avoided, and circular economy contributions.

Circular Economy Analytics

Enterprise-grade analytics tracking material flows, circularity scores, and ESG reporting metrics across your fleet.

Business Partner

Partner as a Recycler

Recycler / Refurbisher
